summary: fixture/db.ts still references SQLite paths and file artifacts
details: test/fixture/db.ts imports Database from @/storage/db and its resetDatabase() function deletes SQLite-specific files (.db, .db-wal, .db-shm). The app has migrated to PG and the Database API now wraps PGlite/pg, not SQLite. The WAL/SHM cleanup is dead code for the PG path. Recommend updating to use PGlite :memory: or PG truncation instead.

summary: adapter.unit.test.ts tests SQLiteAdapter but app has migrated to PG
details: The entire adapter.unit.test.ts is wrapped in `describe("SQLiteAdapter", ...)` and uses SQLite-specific APIs: db.run, db.all, autoincrement DDL, SQLite transaction options ({ _tag: "sqlite", behavior: "immediate" }). The test imports DatabaseAdapter.defaultLayer from @/storage/adapter which may resolve to the SQLite adapter. The test currently fails (exit code 1) - need to determine if the DatabaseAdapter Layer now defaults to PG or the SQLite path is broken. Recommend migrating to adapter.pg.test.ts pattern or updating adapter.unit.test.ts to test PG adapter.
